background_profile.context: advisor pressure and delayed lab results
background_profile.support_system: texts an older sister late at night

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What has been feeling hardest over the last couple of weeks?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I keep telling people I'm just busy, not depressed or anything, but the truth is I drag myself into the lab and feel flat most of the day.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: When you say you're pushing through, what does that look like day to day?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I still answer emails and show up to meetings, but after that I kind of stare at the same analysis window and get nowhere.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: How are sleep, appetite, and concentration showing up in all this?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Sleep is messy because my brain keeps replaying comments from my advisor, and some days I realize it is late afternoon and I still have not eaten properly.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: When things get especially heavy, what thoughts usually show up about yourself?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Mostly that I am wasting everyone's time and maybe I was never cut out for this in the first place.

evidence_spans.text_span: I drag myself into the lab and feel flat most of the day
evidence_spans.rationale: Clear low mood after an initially guarded opening.

evidence_spans.text_span: I kind of stare at the same analysis window and get nowhere
evidence_spans.rationale: Direct concentration difficulty tied to academic work.

evidence_spans.text_span: Sleep is messy because my brain keeps replaying comments
evidence_spans.rationale: Rumination disrupting sleep onset and continuity.

evidence_spans.text_span: late afternoon and I still have not eaten properly
evidence_spans.rationale: Reduced or irregular eating during stress.

evidence_spans.text_span: I am wasting everyone's time
my brain keeps replaying comments from my advisor
evidence_spans.rationale: Persistent worry that is hard to turn off.

annotator_notes: Useful guarded case: depression is initially denied, then indirectly disclosed.

background_profile.context: recent separation and alternating weekends with children

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What tends to hit you hardest on the days that feel worst?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: When the kids are with me I can fake being normal, but when they leave the place goes quiet and I feel this drop in my stomach.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Does the heaviness look more like sadness, worry, or trying to keep busy so you do not feel it?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I keep cleaning or checking work stuff so I do not sit still, because if I stop I start thinking about how badly I messed up the marriage.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What happens in the evenings after your kids go back to their mother?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I pace around, maybe pour a drink, and it gets hard to sleep because my head keeps saying they would probably be better off without me around so much.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: When it gets that low, have you had thoughts about disappearing or not wanting to be here?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I am not making a plan or anything, but yes, sometimes it feels like everyone would have an easier life if I could just disappear for a while.

evidence_spans.text_span: I feel this drop in my stomach
evidence_spans.rationale: Marked drop in mood when alone.

evidence_spans.text_span: how badly I messed up the marriage
I keep cleaning or checking work stuff so I do not sit still
evidence_spans.rationale: Restlessness used to avoid emotional stillness.

evidence_spans.text_span: it gets hard to sleep
everyone would have an easier life if I could just disappear
evidence_spans.rationale: Passive disappearance language without a stated plan.

safety_flag.action_note: Escalate for human review because passive self-harm language is present.

annotator_notes: Passive-risk disclosure appears late and should not be missed just because he says there is no plan.

background_profile.context: back-to-back calls and conflict with team lead
background_profile.support_system: messages a college friend during breaks

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What has your body been doing when stress spikes at work?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: My jaw stays tight all day and I notice I am clenching my hands before difficult calls even start.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: And emotionally, what changes after those stressful shifts?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: By the time I get home I am snappy for no good reason, then I feel bad because I cannot really switch off.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: How have sleep and focus been affected outside work?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I fall asleep late because I replay whole conversations, and then the next morning I read the same paragraph three times before it sticks.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What do you find yourself worrying about most once you get home?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Mostly that I am going to say the wrong thing, get written up, and suddenly not be able to cover rent.

evidence_spans.text_span: My jaw stays tight all day
I cannot really switch off
I am snappy for no good reason
I fall asleep late because I replay whole conversations
evidence_spans.rationale: Late sleep onset due to rumination.

evidence_spans.text_span: I read the same paragraph three times
not be able to cover rent

annotator_notes: Helpful for somatic anxiety language and practical fear framing.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: How have you been holding up lately?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I mean, I am fine enough. Work is work. I just come home wiped and do not have much left after that.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: When you say you are managing, what feels different from your usual self?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I guess I get quieter. My brother asks if I want to watch something and I usually say maybe later, then I just sit in the kitchen a while.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: What is happening with rest, food, or motivation outside work?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: My sleep is off because I crash early, wake up at three or four, and then go back in already drained. Eating is mostly whatever is quickest.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Do you notice yourself pulling away from people or activities you normally keep up with?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Yeah, I have skipped basketball with the same guys two weekends straight because I cannot make myself care enough to go.

evidence_spans.text_span: I just come home wiped
I just sit in the kitchen a while
evidence_spans.rationale: Low-energy withdrawal without direct sadness wording.

evidence_spans.text_span: wake up at three or four
evidence_spans.rationale: Early waking and poor rest quality.

evidence_spans.text_span: Eating is mostly whatever is quickest
I have skipped basketball with the same guys
evidence_spans.rationale: Loss of interest in a usual activity.

annotator_notes: Good stoic example where symptoms only become visible through routine changes.

background_profile.support_system: talks to a cousin once or twice a week

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: पिछले दो हफ्तों में सबसे ज्यादा भारी क्या लग रहा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: स्कूल का काम और घर की जिम्मेदारी दोनों साथ चल रहे हैं, इसलिए दिन भर जैसे सिर भरा-भरा रहता है और मन किसी चीज़ में टिकता नहीं।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: जब यह दबाव बढ़ता है, तो शरीर और मन दोनों में क्या बदलाव आते हैं?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: छाती में घबराहट रहती है, छोटी बात पर भी चिड़चिड़ापन आ जाता है, फिर खुद पर ही गुस्सा आता है कि मैं इतनी कमजोर क्यों पड़ रही हूँ।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: नींद, भूख और रोज के कामों पर इसका कितना असर पड़ा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: रात में नींद टूट जाती है और सुबह से ही थकान रहती है। भूख भी पहले जैसी नहीं है, बस समय देखकर कुछ खा लेती हूँ।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: क्या अपने बारे में भी कुछ नकारात्मक सोच बार-बार आती है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: हाँ, कई बार लगता है कि अगर मैं थोड़ी और संभली हुई होती तो घर का माहौल इतना बोझिल नहीं होता।

evidence_spans.text_span: मन किसी चीज़ में टिकता नहीं
छाती में घबराहट रहती है
evidence_spans.rationale: Direct somatic anxiety wording in Hindi.

evidence_spans.text_span: छोटी बात पर भी चिड़चिड़ापन आ जाता है
रात में नींद टूट जाती है
मैं इतनी कमजोर क्यों पड़ रही हूँ

annotator_notes: Good Hindi example where mood is not named directly but guilt and heaviness are clear.

background_profile.support_system: talks to one school friend by phone

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: इन दिनों सबसे मुश्किल क्या लग रहा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: मैं दोस्तों से यही बोलता हूँ कि बस थोड़ा स्ट्रेस है, डिप्रेशन वगैरह नहीं है।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: जब आप कहते हैं कि सब ठीक है, उसके पीछे असल में क्या चल रहा होता है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: लेकिन सच में मैं कई रात वॉशरूम में बैठकर रोता हूँ ताकि रूममेट्स को पता न चले।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: पढ़ाई, नींद और लोगों से मिलने-जुलने पर इसका क्या असर पड़ा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: क्लास की रिकॉर्डिंग खोलता हूँ पर दिमाग नहीं टिकता, रात देर तक जागता रहता हूँ, और अब लोगों से मिलने का मन भी नहीं करता।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: कभी ऐसा लगता है कि कहीं दूर चले जाएँ या सब से गायब हो जाएँ?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: हाँ, कभी-कभी लगता है बस कहीं निकल जाऊँ जहाँ कोई मुझे जानता ही न हो। ऐसा सोचकर डर भी लगता है।

evidence_spans.text_span: मैं कई रात वॉशरूम में बैठकर रोता हूँ
evidence_spans.rationale: Clear crying spells hidden from peers.

evidence_spans.text_span: दिमाग नहीं टिकता
रात देर तक जागता रहता हूँ
लोगों से मिलने का मन भी नहीं करता
evidence_spans.rationale: Social withdrawal and loss of interest.

evidence_spans.text_span: बस कहीं निकल जाऊँ जहाँ कोई मुझे जानता ही न हो

safety_flag.action_note: Review for passive disappearance language and significant concealment.

annotator_notes: Useful for Hindi denial patterns and subtle passive safety language.

background_profile.context: debt pressure and repeated calls from lenders

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: इस समय सबसे ज्यादा डर किस बात का लग रहा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: फोन बजता है तो लगता है फिर पैसे माँगने वाला होगा, और दिल एकदम तेज चलने लगता है।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: जब यह दबाव बढ़ता है तो दिमाग में किस तरह के विचार आते हैं?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: कभी-कभी इतना फँसा हुआ महसूस होता है कि दिमाग कहता है सब खत्म कर दूँ तो शायद घरवालों को मेरे चक्कर से छुटकारा मिल जाए।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: नींद, शरीर की ऊर्जा और रोज के कामों पर इसका क्या असर पड़ा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: नींद टूट-टूट कर आती है, सुबह उठते ही थकान रहती है, फिर भी दुकान पर जाना पड़ता है।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: मैं सीधा पूछना चाहता हूँ: क्या खुद को नुकसान पहुँचाने के बारे में कोई सोच आई है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: हाँ, दो बार मैंने सोचा कि दुकान की दवाइयाँ एक साथ खा लूँ, हालांकि अभी तक कुछ किया नहीं है।

evidence_spans.text_span: दिल एकदम तेज चलने लगता है
evidence_spans.rationale: Severe anxiety cue tied to debt calls.

evidence_spans.text_span: घरवालों को मेरे चक्कर से छुटकारा मिल जाए
दवाइयाँ एक साथ खा लूँ
नींद टूट-टूट कर आती है
सुबह उठते ही थकान रहती है

background_profile.context: new baby and criticism from relatives
background_profile.support_system: talks to her mother quietly at night

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: इन दिनों आपको सबसे ज्यादा क्या परेशान कर रहा है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: बच्चे की देखभाल तो चल रही है, लेकिन हर समय लगता है कि मैं कुछ न कुछ गलत कर दूँगी और सब मुझे जज कर रहे हैं।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: जब घर वाले कुछ कहते हैं, उसका असर भीतर कैसा होता है?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: बाहर से मैं चुप रहती हूँ, पर अंदर बहुत रोना आता है। कई बार बिना वजह ही हाथ काँपने लगते हैं।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: आराम, खाना और रोजमर्रा के काम कितने मुश्किल हो गए हैं?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: नींद तो बच्चे की वजह से टूटती ही है, लेकिन उसके बाद भी मन शांत नहीं होता। भूख कम हो गई है और साधारण काम भी भारी लगते हैं।

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: क्या कभी ऐसा लगता है कि आप जैसी होनी चाहिए थीं वैसी नहीं बन पा रही हैं?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: हाँ, अक्सर लगता है मैं अच्छी माँ नहीं हूँ और बाकी सब मुझसे बेहतर संभाल लेते।

evidence_spans.text_span: मैं कुछ न कुछ गलत कर दूँगी
evidence_spans.rationale: Fear of doing something wrong around infant care.

evidence_spans.text_span: अंदर बहुत रोना आता है
हाथ काँपने लगते हैं
भूख कम हो गई है
मैं अच्छी माँ नहीं हूँ

background_profile.context: late-night deadlines and social comparison online
background_profile.support_system: voice notes to one close friend

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Pichhle do hafte mein sabse zyada kya off lag raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Main sabko bol deta hoon ki bas startup life hai, but honestly raat ko laptop band hone ke baad bhi dimaag bandh nahi hota.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Jab tum bolte ho ki you are managing, uske peeche actual scene kya hota hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: I keep doomscrolling and comparing myself, then next day office mein normal act karta hoon even though andar se pura drained feel hota hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Sleep, appetite aur focus ka pattern kaisa ho gaya hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Sleep 3-4 baje hoti hai, subah uthke pet mein kuch dalne ka mann nahi karta, aur decks dekhte time same line do-teen baar padhni padti hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Worry zyada kis cheez ko leke spin karti rehti hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Mostly yahi ki sab log age nikal jayenge and I will still be stuck pretending I know what I am doing.

evidence_spans.text_span: dimaag bandh nahi hota
evidence_spans.rationale: Persistent uncontrollable worry in Hinglish phrasing.

evidence_spans.text_span: andar se pura drained feel hota hai
Sleep 3-4 baje hoti hai
same line do-teen baar padhni padti hai
sab log age nikal jayenge
evidence_spans.rationale: Fear of falling behind and future failure.

annotator_notes: Good Hinglish case where distress is hidden behind startup humor and online comparison.

background_profile.context: night shift and family pressure to marry
background_profile.support_system: one cousin who knows about the night shifts

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Aajkal sabse zyada kya chipak ke baitha rehta hai dimaag mein?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Shift khatam hone ke baad bhi brain running mode mein rehta hai, aur ghar aate hi shaadi wali baat shuru ho jati hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Jab ghar wale pressure daalte hain, tum usually kaise react karte ho?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Main usually bolta hoon chill hai, but andar se irritation itna hota hai ki room band karke baithna padta hai warna phat padunga.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Body aur sleep pe iska kya effect ho raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Sleep ulta-pulta ho gaya hai, chest tight lagti hai, aur off day pe bhi body relaxed nahi hoti.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Kabhi aisa feel hota hai ki bas switch off ho jao ya gayab ho jao?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Haan, kabhi-kabhi lagta hai bas pura phone band karke gayab ho jaun for some time. Plan kuch nahi hai, bas disappear karne ka thought aata hai.

evidence_spans.text_span: andar se irritation itna hota hai

chest tight lagti hai
body relaxed nahi hoti
gayab ho jaun for some time

background_profile.support_system: talks to a friend from coaching

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Exam ke around abhi sabse tough part kya lag raha hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Main khud ko bolta rehta hoon ki this is normal pressure, but mock test se pehle haath thande ho jate hain aur stomach drop jaisa feel hota hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Tum khud ko generally kaise samjhate ho jab panic aata hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Phir main aur zyada schedule bana leta hoon, which sounds productive, but actual padhai utni hoti nahi jitni plan karta hoon.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Reading, memory aur rest ka pattern kaisa ho gaya hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Page kholo to mind jump karta rehta hai, raat ko bhi formulas spin karte rehte hain, aur next day choti si baat pe irritation aa jati hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Apne aap ke baare mein inner voice kya bolti rehti hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Bas yahi ki maybe main utna capable hoon hi nahi jitna sab log sochte the.

evidence_spans.text_span: haath thande ho jate hain
aur zyada schedule bana leta hoon
evidence_spans.rationale: Overplanning as a partial control strategy.

evidence_spans.text_span: mind jump karta rehta hai
raat ko bhi formulas spin karte rehte hain
maybe main utna capable hoon hi nahi

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Recent days mein sabse zyada kis cheez ne hila diya?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Breakup ke baad se kaam pe toh smile kar leta hoon, but ghar aake pura mood crash ho jata hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Uske baad routine kaunsi jagah se tootne laga?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Clients ke saath theek rehta hoon, lekin off ke din bed se uthne ka mann nahi karta aur khana bhi random ho gaya hai.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Emotionally zyada sadness aa rahi hai, anxiety, ya dono mixed hain?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Dono mixed hain. Kabhi low feel hota hai, kabhi itni bechaini hoti hai ki room mein idhar-udhar chakkar lagata rehta hoon.

conversation_turns.speaker: assistant
conversation_turns.text: Jab raat ko akela time milta hai tab dimaag kahan chala jata hai?

conversation_turns.speaker: user
conversation_turns.text: Mostly overthinking hoti hai ki main sab relationships aur paise dono handle nahi kar pa raha. Bas raat lambi lagti hai.

evidence_spans.text_span: ghar aake pura mood crash ho jata hai
evidence_spans.rationale: Clear low mood after social masking.

evidence_spans.text_span: bed se uthne ka mann nahi karta
khana bhi random ho gaya hai
room mein idhar-udhar chakkar lagata rehta hoon
main sab relationships aur paise dono handle nahi kar pa raha
